prediction.reasoning: As an AI, I do not have access to real-time market data beyond my last training update, nor do I possess predictive capabilities for short-term stock price movements. Therefore, this prediction is a general estimate acknowledging the inherent volatility and uncertainty of the stock market over a 3-day period.
